blended.narrative: Burke Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 55°F.

Sunday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
